final:
module RefModule(
    input [15:0] entrada,
    input clk,
    input load,
    output reg [15:0] saida
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (load == 1) begin
           saida <= entrada;
        end
    end
endmodule
